base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_credit_indicator — a ui (logo) from 1981 galaga. 'CREDIT' label + small 2-digit credit counter (ranges 00-99). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
